## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Keep it focused — single responsibility. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Use a GitHub keyword so the issue auto-closes on merge, e.g. Closes #123 -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Chore / refactor / tooling (`chore:`)
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Test plan

<!-- What did you run to verify this change? -->

- [ ] `pnpm check` (type-check + lint) passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` (or relevant `--filter` package tests) passes
- [ ] Tested both editions if behavior differs by edition (`self_host` / `cloud`)
- Manual verification steps:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Any DB migrations were generated via `pnpm db:generate` (never hand-authored)
- [ ] I have enabled "Allow edits from maintainers"
- [ ] I will sign the CLA when the CLA Assistant bot prompts me
